tasks.prompt: Add accessibilityLabel to icon-only buttons as described in REVIEW-SWIFTUI.md (H-4). Specifically for Go up button, Refresh button, Remove staged item (DropZoneView), and Transfer log chevron.
Replace fixed font sizes with semantic styles or use @ScaledMetric to allow for Dynamic Type scaling as described in REVIEW-SWIFTUI.md (H-3).
Add a startup or cleanup mechanism for temp askpass scripts and key files to ensure no secrets are left in the temp directory after a crash, as described in REVIEW-SECURITY.md (2c).
Unify stagedUploads into a single source of truth (e.g. in TransferManager) to fix the duplicate state issue between MainView and LocalBrowserView (M-1 in REVIEW-SWIFTUI.md).
